name: Strawberry Shortcake Ala Suzy De Bus
recipeIngredient: 1 Angel food cake, cut into slices
1 package Fresh strawberries (use blueberries as a substitute)
1 package Vanilla pudding (use lemon pudding if using blueberries)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cake slices on a serving platter.
2. Cook the pudding according to package instructions and pour it over the cake.
3. Add 2/3 to 3/4 of the berries on top of the pudding, then refrigerate.
4. In another bowl, mix the remaining berries with the Cool Whip.
5. When ready to serve, remove the cake from the refrigerator and top the entire dessert with the berry-laden Cool Whip.
